subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the capital city of Rajasthan and which forts are considered important?
question_hi: राजस्थान की राजधानी और महत्वपूर्ण कंगर्में
question_en: Which are the important forts in Rajasthan and which cities are they located?
question_hi: राजस्थान में महत्तां और विभागों क्या हैं?
explanation_en: The important forts in Rajasthan are Jaipur, Amer, Udaipur, and Chittorgarh. These forts are located in Jaipur, Amer, Udaipur, and Chittorgarh respectively.
explanation_hi: राजस्थान में महत्तां हैं जयपुर, अमेर, उदयपुर, aur चित्रगढ़. इन महत्तां के क्या स्थान में स्थित हैं जयपुर, अमेर, उदयपुर aur चित्रगढ़
explanation_en: The forts mentioned above are located in Jaipur, Amer, Udaipur, and Chittorgarh districts of Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: उपन्यामेर, उदयपुर aur चित्रगढ़ से स्थित हैं।
question_en: Which districts of Rajasthan are associated with Jaipur, Amer, Udaipur, and Chittor?
question_hi: राजस्थान में Jaipur, अमेर, उदयपुर aur चित्रगढ़ के स्थित हैं।

subject: Rajasthan History
